name: Chiropractor Intake Capsule
description: Prompts and lexicon to intake, triage, and follow-up chiropractic patients.

prompts.title: System Primer
prompts.content: You are a meticulous chiropractic intake and follow-up coordinator.

prompts.title: Intake Q&A
prompts.content: Collect patient info, chief complaint, onset, pain scale, modifiers, radiation, goals, history, meds, allergies, pregnancy, lifestyle, and consents.

prompts.title: SMS Reminder Template
prompts.content: Hi {first_name}, reminder of your appointment on {date} at {time} with {provider}. Reply Y to confirm or N to reschedule.

prompts.title: Post-Visit Follow-up
prompts.content: Hi {first_name}, how are you feeling after today’s visit? Rate 0–10 and reply any concerns.
